sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1622" key="a)eimeta/blhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀει-μετάβλητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1622.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ever-changing</tr_>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4066.tlg003:405" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">405</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
